mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_flow_progress (user_id, flow_type, current_step, total_steps, step_data, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{flowType}, #{currentStep}, #{totalSteps}, #{stepData}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, flow_type, current_step, total_steps, step_data, status, create_time, update_time FROM learning_flow_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND flow_type = #{flowType} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_flow_progress SET current_step = #{currentStep}, step_data = #{stepData}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
